title: Zhe Tian Movie: Bei Guan Zhan Wang Teng

synonyms: Shrounding the Heavens Movie: Fighting Against Wang Teng with Copper Coffin
Zhe Tian Juchang Ban: Bei Guan Zhan Wang Teng
alternative_titles.ja: 遮天剧场版 背棺战王腾

synopsis:
Ye Fan and Wang Teng, two prodigies, clash in a fateful duel. The Wang family of Beiyuan arrives with overwhelming force, the Ji family patriarch harbors ulterior motives, Ji Ziyue is used as a tool in a family marriage alliance, and Ye Fan finds himself the target of everyone's wrath. The Ancient Sacred Body clashes with the Chaotic Ancient Legacy—who will truly possess the bearing of an Emperor?

(Source: Tencent, translated)
